title: frenela juniperoides
intro: Frenela juniperoides, also known as Mexican juniper or Frenkelia, is a small, evergreen tree native to Mexico, which is used as a substitute for the juniper tree. The medicinal properties of Frenela juniperoides include its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and diuretic properties, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits associated with Frenela juniperoides include its ability to relieve urinary tract infections, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of bronchitis and other respiratory issues. Frenela juniperoides can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and it is often used in traditional medicine to treat a range of health conditions.
